title: Coinbase 2026 Outlook and Market Predictions
text: Crypto markets entering phase where activity concentration matters more than narrative momentum, with 2026 framing test of whether crypto's core markets can scale under disciplined conditions. Familiar crypto cycle models built around retail speculation becoming less reliable as institutional participation and market plumbing play larger role. Stablecoins and payments represent crypto's most persistent source of real-world usage with stablecoin transaction volumes continuing to grow through settlement, cross-border transfers, and liquidity management. Prediction market size poised to expand 370% compared to last year to reach record $240 billion in trading volume in 2026. Coinbase Everything Exchange strategy launched Q4 2025 with tokenized equities, prediction markets, gold and silver futures, and perpetual stock futures, built on thesis that users who come for crypto stay for broader financial platform. Office of Comptroller of Currency's conditional approval for national trust charter described as single most important regulatory development in Coinbase's history.
